69f1ce000000000000000001 description: Fence wants a small proof before he wastes more words on you. Bring him one PMC dogtag. Any side. If the tag is real, maybe you are too.
69f1ce000000000000000001 startedMessageT: One tag. That's all. USEC, BEAR, I don't care. Bring me proof you can put another contractor in the ground and come back with something to show for it.
69f1ce000000000000000001 successMessageT: Good. Fresh enough. You did the work and you came back in one piece. Here's your cut. Don't confuse a first payment with trust.
69f1ce000000000000000001 changeQuestMess: Still waiting on that tag. One is enough. No excuses.
